signals.raw:
US, Israel, and Iran Agree to Two-Week Ceasefire; Kremlin Welcomes Deal | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

The Kremlin explicitly welcomed the last-minute ceasefire agreement between the US, Israel, and Iran on Wednesday (April 8, 2026), emphasizing de-escalation and a shift to diplomatic talks while supporting no further military escalation.[1] This 11th-hour deal aims to avert wider war and addre

signals.headline: BUCKINGHAM PALACE CONFIRMS KING CHARLES' STATE VISIT TO US IN LATE APRIL TO MEET TRUMP AMID CRITICISM | NO | HIGH confid
signals.raw:
BUCKINGHAM PALACE CONFIRMS KING CHARLES' STATE VISIT TO US IN LATE APRIL TO MEET TRUMP AMID CRITICISM | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Buckingham Palace has confirmed that King Charles and Queen Camilla will visit the United States in late April for a state visit with President Donald Trump, despite backlash over Trump's criticisms of the UK, its armed forces, and Prime Minister Keir Starmer.[1]
